title: Qiu Siping
content:
He Cooperated with Wang Lin to steal 2 nascent souls that were of his master and senior brother in the sea of devils. He wasn't able to do so because the place was blocked with an ancient formation and he needed a person proficient in that that is why he took help from Wang Lin in exchange of his master's Nascent's soul. 

He met with 
Wang Lin
 another time at the Treasure pavillon when Wang Lin visited the pavilion with Li Muwan for auction of level 6 pill recipe to help 
Li Muwan
 reach 
Nascent Soul
 Stage. He didn't recognize him because Wang Lin had reached 
Soul Formation
 Stage in 100 years and went with him to the the reincarnation tree. Qiu Siping was refined by one of the six 6 leaf shaman savages.
